## Meeting Purpose

[Interview between Rachel Pasche (candidate) and Aida Knežević (managing editor at GrowthX) to discuss the managing editor role and Rachel's experience.](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The managing editor role combines editing (40-50% of time), client management, performance reporting, and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Rachel has diverse editing experience across multiple industries, adapting quickly to new subjects](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [GrowthX uses AI extensively for content generation, requiring strong prompt engineering and quality control skills](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Key skills needed: SEO fundamentals, content quality assessment, prompt engineering, and efficient freelance writer management](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview

  - [Hybrid role combining editing, client management, performance reporting, and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [40-50% of time spent on editing and working with freelancers](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Weekly client meetings to update on content performance](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Monthly content strategy work, especially for new clients](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)

### Rachel's Editing Experience

  - [Diverse portfolio across various industries:](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
      - [CNET: Product and tech content for Best Buy and Staples accounts](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
      - [Travel content, blogs, and newsletters for small businesses and magazines](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Camping gear and household products](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [Health and wellness: Sleep products, health gear, supplements](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

### Industry Adaptation

  - [Rachel can adapt to new industries in about 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Research strategy: Analyze top competitors and SERPs, identify key terms, deep dive into specific topics](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Aida suggests using AI (e.g., ChatGPT) to analyze product pages and identify customer pain points](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)

### Freelance Writer Management

  - [Rachel prefers over-communication, including weekly check-ins (video/phone/email)](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Provides feedback using a "show vs. tell" model with marked-up examples](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Aida emphasizes balancing perfectionism with efficiency, especially when working with AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### SEO Tools and Strategies

  - [Rachel familiar with Ahrefs, less so with SEMrush and Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Used for keyword research, SERP analysis, and content optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Aida notes GrowthX's performance reporting focuses on clicks and impressions via Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)

### Content Strategy Development

  - [Rachel has limited experience developing content strategies for small sites](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [Aida explains the process: understanding client goals, customer base, and how content can drive results](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [Emphasizes the importance of search intent and balancing AI-assisted research with human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)

### Challenges in the Role

  - [Aida's unexpected challenge: Managing freelance writers and ensuring content quality](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [Importance of finding reliable freelancers who follow instructions and meet deadlines](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)
  - [Balancing quality control with efficiency, especially when working with AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to discuss the interview with Kyle (presumably a hiring manager or team lead)](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2234.0)
  - [GrowthX team to follow up with Rachel soon regarding next steps](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2241.0)
  - [For those interested in similar roles, focus on developing skills in:](https://fathom.video/share/Ndqsy8Zfz4frHz8xGoTzybSk_sJaLjjZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
    1.  Prompt engineering
    2.  SEO fundamentals (keyword research, competitor analysis, sales cycle keyword mapping)
    3.  Content quality assessment and improvement
